trustCheckin.step1Desc: Confirm your identity with photo verification
trustCheckin.emsInfo: In case of a life-threatening emergency, we will contact EMS (119) first, then you immediately.
trustCheckin.firstAidConsent: I authorize the specialist to administer basic first aid (wound cleaning, bandaging, ice packs) if medically necessary during the session.
trustCheckin.noContagiousConsent: I confirm my child has no undisclosed contagious conditions (fever, rash, vomiting, diarrhea) within the past 48 hours.
trustCheckin.emergencyTransportConsent: In a medical emergency, I authorize the specialist to call EMS (119) and accompany my child to the nearest hospital if I cannot be reached within 5 minutes.
trustCheckin.acceptProtocols: Please accept all safety protocols and consent items.
trustCheckin.signToAcknowledge: Please sign to acknowledge transfer of care.
trustCheckin.fillAllFields: Please fill in all required fields.
trustCheckin.allergiesHint: Leave blank if no known allergies.
trustCheckin.specialConditionsHint: Any condition the specialist should be aware of.
trustCheckin.windowsSecured: All windows in the room are secured and child-locked.
trustCheckin.balconyLocked: Balcony door is locked and inaccessible to children.
trustCheckin.hazardsRemoved: Sharp objects, medications, and small choking hazards have been removed from the child's reach.
trustCheckin.emergencyExitKnown: I have shown the specialist the nearest emergency exit and fire extinguisher location.
trustCheckin.signatureDesc: Please review and sign below to complete the care handover.
trustCheckin.signatureSummary: By signing below, I acknowledge that I have provided accurate medical and emergency contact information, confirmed the room safety checklist, and consent to the care protocols outlined above. I understand the specialist will follow Petit Stay's Trust Protocol throughout the session.

landing.heroTitle: Find a trusted sitter in Seoul — in 3 minutes
landing.heroSubtitle: Verified profiles. Real reviews. Safe payments. Choose your sitter directly and book with confidence.
landing.trustTitle: Every sitter is background-checked and reviewed
landing.trustSubtitle: Our 5-layer Trust Stack keeps your family safe at every step.
landing.trustVerifiedDesc: Identity, background check, qualifications, and references — confirmed before any sitter goes live.
landing.trustVideoDesc: Watch a 30–60 second self-introduction video before you book. See who your child will meet.
landing.trustReviewDesc: Only parents who completed a paid session can leave a review. No fake reviews, ever.
landing.trustPaymentDesc: Escrow-based payment. Funds are held until the session is complete and you're satisfied.
landing.trustReportDesc: After every session, receive a detailed report: activities, meals, mood, and notes from the sitter.
landing.step1Desc: Enter your date, time, child's age, and area. See available sitters with profiles, reviews, and rates.
landing.step2Desc: Compare profiles, watch intro videos, read real reviews. Pick the sitter you trust most and book directly.
landing.step3Desc: Your sitter arrives, cares for your child, and sends a session report. Leave a review to help other families.
landing.sittersSubtitle: Every sitter sets their own rates and schedule. You choose who's right for your family.
landing.partnerTitle: Hotels & hosts: recommend us to your guests
landing.partnerDesc: Share a QR code or link with your guests. Track referrals on your dashboard. No staffing, no operations — just a better guest experience.
landing.footerTagline: The multilingual babysitting marketplace for families visiting Seoul.

guest.consentSubtitle: Please review and agree to the following before proceeding.
guest.careConsentLabel: I consent to the childcare service
guest.careConsentDetail: I authorize Petit Stay and the assigned specialist to provide childcare services for my child(ren) during the scheduled session. The specialist will follow hotel-approved activity guidelines, including play, snack time, and rest. I understand that the specialist is a vetted, certified professional and that the session will be conducted in accordance with Petit Stay's Trust Protocol.
guest.privacyConsentLabel: I consent to personal information collection
guest.privacyConsentDetail: I agree to the collection and processing of personal information including my name, contact details, child(ren)'s name, age, medical/allergy information, and emergency contact details. This data is processed in accordance with Korea's Personal Information Protection Act (PIPA) and is retained only for the duration necessary to provide the service. Data is stored securely and is not shared with third parties beyond what is necessary for service delivery.
guest.emergencyConsentLabel: I consent to emergency response procedures
guest.emergencyConsentDetail: In the event of a medical emergency, I authorize the specialist to: (1) administer basic first aid, (2) contact emergency services (119), (3) accompany my child to the nearest hospital if I cannot be reached within 5 minutes, and (4) share relevant medical information with emergency responders. I understand that Petit Stay carries comprehensive liability insurance covering up to KRW 100,000,000 per incident.

about.title: About Petit Stay
about.subtitle: A multilingual babysitting marketplace for families traveling in Korea.
about.missionDesc: We help parents reclaim their time — even when traveling with children. Petit Stay connects foreign families visiting Korea with verified multilingual sitters they can search, choose, and book directly.
about.whereDesc: We are preparing to launch in Seoul, starting with areas popular among international travelers. Hotels, serviced residences, and Airbnb hosts can join as referral partners to recommend Petit Stay to their guests.
about.visionDesc: A world where families with young children can travel freely, knowing trusted childcare is just a few taps away — in any city, in any language.
about.storyDesc1: Petit Stay started with a simple observation: foreign families visiting Seoul had almost no way to find a reliable, language-compatible babysitter. Referral-based services exist, but a standardized matching platform where parents can compare, choose, and book sitters directly was not publicly available.
about.storyDesc2: In 2026, Petit Stay was founded to fill that gap. We are building a marketplace that combines the trust signals parents need — verified credentials, video introductions, real reviews from completed sessions — with the convenience of direct search and booking.
about.value_safetyDesc: Every sitter is verified. Every session is tracked. Children's safety is non-negotiable.
about.value_trustDesc: Verified reviews, credential checks, and transparent pricing — trust is built into every layer.
about.value_accessibilityDesc: Multilingual platform and sitters who speak your language — English, Japanese, Korean, and more.
about.value_transparencyDesc: Sitters set their own prices. Parents see everything before they book. No hidden fees.
about.value_partnershipDesc: Hotels and hosts recommend us to their guests. They are referral partners, not employers.
about.value_excellenceDesc: From sitter onboarding to session reports, we hold every touchpoint to a high standard.

careers.title: Careers
careers.subtitle: We're looking for people who want to build something meaningful together.
careers.whyDesc: Petit Stay is an early-stage startup preparing for its first pilot in 2026. We're building a babysitting marketplace for international families in Korea — a problem no one has solved with a proper platform yet. If you want to build a real product from scratch, this is the place.
careers.job1Desc: Build the core marketplace — search, sitter profiles, booking flow, payment, and review system. React 19, TypeScript, Firebase. Remote OK (Asia-Pacific timezone).
careers.job2Desc: Build relationships with hotels, serviced residences, and Airbnb hosts. You'll own the partner pipeline from first contact to QR code placement.
careers.job3Desc: Recruit, screen, and onboard sitters. Manage credential verification, background checks, and training programs. This role directly shapes service quality.
careers.job4Desc: Design trust-centered UX for parents, sitters, and channel partners. Mobile-first, multilingual, warm but not childish. Remote OK (Asia-Pacific timezone).
careers.benefit1: Stock options — early-stage equity for all full-time team members
careers.benefit2: Flexible remote work with quarterly team gatherings in Seoul
careers.benefit3: Annual learning budget (₩2,000,000) for conferences, courses, and certifications
careers.benefit4: Health insurance and annual health check-up coverage
careers.applyEmail: Send your resume and a brief note about why you're interested to careers@petitstay.com. We review every application and respond within five business days.
careers.cultureDesc: Small team, high ownership. Everyone ships. We move fast but never cut corners on children's safety. Honest communication, mutual trust, and a shared belief that this problem is worth solving well.
careers.lookingFor1: People who take ownership and finish what they start
careers.lookingFor2: Builders comfortable working across code, design, and customer conversations
careers.lookingFor3: Professionals who understand that safety and trust are not optional in childcare
careers.lookingFor4: Team players who communicate openly and support each other
careers.processStep1: Submit your resume and a brief cover note
careers.processStep2: Screening call with our team (30 min)
careers.processStep3: Practical assessment — a real task reflecting the work you'd do here
careers.processStep4: Final interview with the founder, offer within 5 business days
careers.job5Desc: Build serverless backend services — matching, payment settlement, notifications, and data pipelines. Node.js, Firebase Cloud Functions, Firestore.
careers.benefit5: Home office setup allowance (₩1,000,000 for new hires)
careers.benefit6: Unlimited paid time off with a minimum 15-day annual expectation

press.title: Press & Roadmap
press.subtitle: What we've done and where we're headed.
press.news1Title: Petit Stay V2 Marketplace Platform Completed
press.news1Desc: Petit Stay has completed development of its V2 marketplace platform — enabling parents to directly search, compare, and book multilingual sitters in Seoul. March 2026.
press.news2Title: Petit Stay Preparing Seoul Pilot Operations
press.news2Desc: Petit Stay is preparing pilot operations in Seoul, starting with select hotels and serviced residences as referral partners. Sitter onboarding and partner outreach are underway. Target: Q2 2026.
press.mediaKitDesc: For logos, brand guidelines, and images, please contact press@petitstay.com.
press.inquiriesDesc: Journalists and media professionals can reach us at press@petitstay.com. We respond within 24 hours.
press.news3Title: Applying to Government Startup Support Programs
press.news3Desc: Petit Stay is applying to government startup support programs to accelerate platform development and pilot operations. Applications are in progress.
press.news4Desc: Petit Stay is preparing a pre-seed funding round to scale sitter onboarding and expand partner channels. Investor outreach is underway.

help.title: Help Center
help.subtitle: Answers to common questions about Petit Stay.
help.pa1: Petit Stay is a multilingual babysitting marketplace for families traveling in Korea. You can search for verified sitters, compare profiles and reviews, and book directly — all from your phone.
help.pq2: How do I find and book a sitter?
help.pa2: Enter your date, time, and child's age on the search page. Browse sitter profiles — each includes photos, a video introduction, credentials, reviews, and pricing. Choose the sitter you like and complete the booking with your child's details and payment.
help.pa3: Every sitter goes through ID verification, credential checks, and reference review. Sitters with CPR/first-aid certification and video introductions earn trust badges visible on their profiles.
help.pa4: Sitters set their own hourly rates. You can see each sitter's price on their profile before booking. Petit Stay charges a service fee on top of the sitter's rate — the total is shown clearly at checkout.
help.pq5: What if I need to cancel?
help.pa5: Free cancellation is available up to 2 hours before the session. Cancellations within 2 hours incur a 50% fee. No-shows are charged in full.
help.sq1: How do I become a sitter on Petit Stay?
help.sa1: Register as a sitter on the platform, complete your profile (photo, video intro, credentials), and set your availability and pricing. Our team reviews your application and credentials before activation.
help.sq2: Can I set my own prices?
help.sa2: Yes. You set your own hourly rate. Petit Stay shows recommended price ranges, but the final rate is entirely up to you.
help.sa3: Payments are held in escrow during the session and released after completion. Earnings are settled to your registered account on a regular schedule.
help.sq4: Can I decline a booking request?
help.sa4: Yes. You can accept or decline each booking request. Your accept rate is visible on your profile, so we recommend responding promptly.
help.ta1: Hotels, serviced residences, and Airbnb hosts can join as referral partners. You recommend Petit Stay to your guests via QR code or link — we handle everything else. You are not an employer or service provider.
help.tq2: How does the QR code work?
help.ta2: Place the QR code in guest rooms or at the front desk. When guests scan it, they land on the Petit Stay search page with your property tracked as the referral source.
help.tq3: Is there any cost for partners?
help.ta3: No. There is no setup fee or ongoing cost for referral partners.
help.contactDesc: Can't find what you're looking for? Reach out to support@petitstay.com.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.subtitle: In accordance with Article 30 of the Personal Information Protection Act (PIPA), Petit Stay Inc. processes personal information as follows.
privacy.section1Content: We collect the following information when you create an account, make a booking, or register as a sitter: name, email address, phone number, and payment details. For child safety, we collect children's age, allergies, and special care requirements provided by parents. Sitter profiles include credentials, certifications, and experience details. We also collect device information and usage data for platform security.
privacy.section2Content: We use your information to: facilitate sitter search and booking between parents and sitters; verify sitter credentials and maintain trust badges; send booking confirmations, session updates, and review requests; process payments through escrow and settle sitter earnings; improve our services through anonymized analytics; and comply with legal obligations under Korean law.
privacy.section3Content: We share relevant booking details between parents and sitters to facilitate the requested service. Referral partners receive only aggregated booking statistics — no personal information about parents or children. We do not sell personal information. We may share data with service providers: payment processors (PG companies), cloud hosting (Google Cloud/Firebase), and credential verification agencies. All processors are contractually bound to PIPA requirements.
privacy.section4Content: All personal data is encrypted at rest (AES-256) and in transit (TLS 1.3). Access is restricted by role-based controls with multi-factor authentication. We conduct regular security audits. Session data and personal information are stored separately.
privacy.section5Content: Account information is retained during membership and for 1 year after deletion (per the Act on Consumer Protection in Electronic Commerce). Children's data (age, care notes) is deleted 90 days after the session. Payment records are retained for 5 years per tax law. When retention periods expire, data is destroyed without delay using irreversible methods.
privacy.section6Content: You have the right to: access your data and request copies (Article 35); correct inaccurate information (Article 36); request deletion, subject to legal retention (Article 36); suspend processing (Article 37); and withdraw consent at any time (Article 38). Contact privacy@petitstay.com to exercise these rights. We respond within 10 business days.
privacy.section7Content: Children's information (age, medical conditions, allergies) is collected solely for safe childcare. We collect the minimum necessary and store it with enhanced encryption. We never use children's data for marketing or analytics. For children under 14 years of age, we require explicit consent from a parent or legal guardian before collecting any personal information, in accordance with Article 22 of PIPA.
privacy.section8Content: We use essential cookies for session management. Analytics cookies require your explicit consent and can be disabled in browser settings. We do not use third-party advertising trackers.
privacy.section9Content: Our platform uses Google Cloud (Firebase) infrastructure, which may process data outside the Republic of Korea. All transfers comply with PIPA and are protected by standard contractual clauses.
privacy.section10Content: For privacy inquiries, data access requests, or complaints: privacy@petitstay.com. Petit Stay Inc., Gangnam-gu, Seoul, Republic of Korea. You may also file a complaint with the Personal Information Protection Commission (PIPC) at www.pipc.go.kr.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.subtitle: The terms that make our marketplace safe and fair for everyone.
terms.section1Content: By using Petit Stay, you agree to these Terms and our Privacy Policy. These terms govern the relationship between you and Petit Stay Inc., a company incorporated under the laws of the Republic of Korea. If you do not agree, please do not use our services.
terms.section2Content: Petit Stay operates as a telecommunications sales intermediary (통신판매중개자) under the Act on Consumer Protection in Electronic Commerce. We provide a technology platform where parents can search for, compare, and book independent babysitters. Petit Stay is not a childcare provider — sitters are independent service providers who set their own prices and accept or decline bookings at their discretion. Hotels and hosts participate as referral partners, not employers.
terms.section3Content: Current service area: Seoul. Standard hours: 18:00–23:00 (bookings at least 24 hours in advance are recommended). Age range: children aged 3–8, up to 2 children per session. Service type: in-room babysitting only. Excluded: overnight stays, swimming/outdoor activities, vehicle transport, medication administration, bathing, or medical care.
terms.section4Content: Please provide accurate information when creating your account. You are responsible for keeping your credentials secure and for all activity under your account. If you notice unauthorized access, please contact us immediately.
terms.section5Content: A booking is confirmed when the sitter accepts. Free cancellation is available up to 2 hours before the session. Cancellations within 2 hours incur a 50% fee. No-shows are charged in full. If Petit Stay cancels for safety reasons, a full refund is issued.
terms.section6Content: Payment is collected at the time of booking confirmation and held in escrow until the session is completed. The price shown at checkout includes the sitter's rate and the platform service fee. Payments are processed through licensed Korean PG partners. Refunds for eligible cancellations are returned within 7 business days.
terms.section7Content: Petit Stay verifies sitter credentials and maintains trust badges (background check, CPR/first-aid, video introduction, reference check). However, Petit Stay does not guarantee the outcome of any individual session. Parents are encouraged to review sitter profiles, ratings, and verified reviews before booking.
terms.section8Content: Parents must provide accurate medical, allergy, and dietary information for each child before the session. Sitters provide age-appropriate play, meal assistance, and sleep routine support. Parents should remain reachable by phone during the session. Sessions take place at the accommodation unless otherwise agreed.
terms.section9Content: Users must not: provide false identity or credential information; use the platform for purposes other than childcare bookings; behave inappropriately toward sitters, parents, or other users; arrange direct bookings with sitters outside the platform to circumvent fees; share login credentials; or use the platform in violation of applicable laws.
terms.section10Content: All content, trademarks, logos, and software on the platform belong to Petit Stay Inc. or its licensors. Do not copy, modify, or distribute platform content without written consent. Reviews and feedback may be used for platform purposes under a non-exclusive, royalty-free license.
terms.section11Content: These terms are governed by the laws of the Republic of Korea. Disputes shall be resolved at the Seoul Central District Court. Both parties agree to attempt good-faith resolution for at least 30 days before legal action. Consumer disputes may also be addressed through the Korea Consumer Agency or the e-Commerce Mediation Committee.
terms.section12Content: We may update these terms to improve our services. Significant changes will be communicated via email or in-app notification at least 30 days in advance. Continued use after changes take effect constitutes acceptance. You may close your account before the effective date if you do not agree with the updated terms.

solutions.hotelSubtitle: Recommend trusted sitters to your guests. No cost, no operations burden — just happier families.
solutions.hotelPainSubtitle: Family travelers need childcare, but running it in-house is hard.
solutions.hotelPain1Desc: Recommending unvetted sitters creates liability. Petit Stay's verification process and insurance take that worry off your plate.
solutions.hotelPain2Desc: Your front desk spends hours coordinating childcare requests. Petit Stay automates the entire process from booking to payment.
solutions.hotelPain3Desc: Family travelers represent 35% of luxury hotel guests. Without childcare, you lose F&B revenue when parents stay in their rooms.
solutions.hotelFeat1Desc: View, create, and manage all childcare bookings from a centralized dashboard.
solutions.hotelFeat2Desc: Real-time session tracking with activity logs, photos, and instant alerts.
solutions.hotelFeat3Desc: Automated commission reports and monthly settlement statements.
solutions.hotelFeat4Desc: Response within 2 hours, 99.5% fulfillment rate, 24/7 ops support.
solutions.hotelPricingHint: No upfront cost for hotels. We operate on a per-booking commission model.
solutions.hotelPricing3: Increase hotel revenue per guest and boost guest satisfaction
solutions.hotelCtaTitle: Ready to partner with Petit Stay?
solutions.hotelCtaSubtitle: Join our growing network of premium hotels offering trusted childcare.
solutions.famTitle: Enjoy Your Trip. We'll Take Care of the Rest.
solutions.famSubtitle: Find verified, multilingual sitters so you can make the most of every moment.
solutions.famTrust1Desc: Every specialist passes background checks, certification verification, and ongoing reviews.
solutions.famTrust2Desc: Activity logs, photo updates, and instant chat keep you connected wherever you are.
solutions.famTrust3Desc: Every session is backed by comprehensive liability insurance for complete peace of mind.
solutions.famTrust4Desc: Our platform and specialists support English, Korean, Japanese, and Chinese.
solutions.famSceneSubtitle: Whether it's a romantic dinner or a business meeting, we've got you covered.
solutions.famScene1Desc: Enjoy a romantic evening out while your children are safe and entertained in your hotel room.
solutions.famScene2Desc: Explore the city, visit attractions, or go on adventures without worrying about the kids.
solutions.famScene3Desc: Attend conferences or meetings knowing your children are in professional care.
solutions.famStep1Desc: Select your preferred date, time, and specialist through our app.
solutions.famStep2Desc: Complete our quick safety protocol with medical info and emergency contacts.
solutions.famStep3Desc: Get real-time updates while you enjoy your evening. It's that simple.
solutions.famCtaTitle: Ready to enjoy your next trip?
solutions.famCtaSubtitle: Sign up and book your first session in minutes.
solutions.specSubtitle: Join our network of multilingual sitters serving traveling families in Seoul.
solutions.specBenefit1Desc: Earn your way to Gold tier with premium rates, priority visibility, and more bookings.
solutions.specBenefit2Desc: Earn ₩60,000–₩90,000 per hour with transparent weekly settlements. Top earners exceed ₩3M monthly.
solutions.specBenefit3Desc: Set your own availability. Work evenings, weekends, or whenever suits your lifestyle.
solutions.specBenefit4Desc: Access ongoing training, certifications, and career development opportunities.
solutions.specEarningsSubtitle: Competitive rates that reflect your expertise and dedication.
solutions.specReqSubtitle: We maintain high standards to ensure the best care for families.
solutions.specReq1Desc: Valid certifications in CPR, First Aid, Early Childhood Education required. Licensed childcare teacher credential preferred.
solutions.specReq2Desc: Minimum 2 years professional childcare experience with verifiable references. Experience with international families preferred.
solutions.specReq3Desc: English required, plus at least one of Korean, Japanese, or Chinese. Multilingual candidates preferred.
solutions.specCtaSubtitle: Apply today and start earning as a Petit Stay specialist.

onboarding.quizQ1: What should you do first when arriving at a guest room for a childcare session?
onboarding.quizQ1A: Immediately start playing with the child
onboarding.quizQ1B: Verify identity using the safe word and complete the room safety checklist
onboarding.quizQ1C: Wait for the parent to leave
onboarding.quizQ2: If a child shows signs of an allergic reaction, what is the correct first step?
onboarding.quizQ2A: Check the child's allergy card, administer prescribed medication if available, and contact emergency services
onboarding.quizQ2B: Give the child water and wait
onboarding.quizQ2D: Take the child to the hotel lobby
onboarding.quizQ3: How often should activity updates be logged during a session?
onboarding.quizQ3A: Only at the end of the session
onboarding.quizQ3C: Every 30 minutes or after each significant activity
onboarding.quizQ4: What is the correct procedure for child handoff at check-out?
onboarding.quizQ4A: Leave the child with the front desk
onboarding.quizQ4D: Verify parent identity, complete the check-out checklist, and obtain both signatures
onboarding.quizQ5: When should you report an incident to the Petit Stay operations team?
onboarding.quizQ5B: Immediately for any safety concern, injury, illness, or property damage
onboarding.quizQ5C: At the end of the session
